codes.name: Redirect drops Authorization header silently
codes.explanation: A fix that follows a cross-host redirect re-sends credentials it should have stripped, or strips credentials it should have kept on a same-host redirect. The happy-path test hits a non-redirecting endpoint and never exercises the branch.

codes.name: Connection pool exhausted by un-closed response
codes.explanation: Streaming responses (stream=True) are read partially and never closed, so the underlying connection is never returned to the pool. Under concurrency this manifests as hangs, not errors, defeating timeout-free tests.
